title: Fix user table layout in admin panel
description: The user table in the admin panel (/admin/users) has misaligned rows and poor readability. This task involves fixing the CSS and structure to ensure a consistent, clean, and responsive table layout.
acceptance_criteria: Table headers and columns are perfectly aligned.
Rows have consistent height and spacing.
The table is fully readable on both desktop and mobile (mobile view should probably collapse or scroll properly).
Empty and loading states are correctly styled within the table container.
Actions column is correctly aligned and doesn't break row layout.
Type checking and linting pass (`npm run lint` in frontend/).
